groups.label: Go mountsync security fixes
findings: internal/mountsync/syncer.go-Path traversal via malicious remote server responses-security-review, developer-review, historian-review-critical
internal/mountsync/syncer.go-Mutex unlock/relock race window with security implications-developer-review, security-cross-review, historian-cross-review-high
internal/mountsync/syncer.go-Auth token exposed in WebSocket URL query parameter-security-review, developer-review, historian-review-high
internal/mountsync/syncer.go-Unbounded response body read (bidirectional DoS)-security-review, developer-review, historian-cross-review-medium
groups.rationale: All 4 findings target the same file (syncer.go) and are security-related — path traversal, race condition, token exposure, and unbounded reads
